prediction_boundary: P77 is a contract-definition and validation exercise only. Shadow tracker rows are for research accumulation — NOT a production deployment, NOT a betting recommendation, NOT a market-edge claim. paper_only=True, diagnostic_only=True, production_ready=False.

predicted_side.description: 'home' or 'away' — determined by sp_fip_delta sign (>0 → home, <0 → away)

actual_winner.description: 'home' or 'away' — filled post-game; null until settled

is_correct.description: True if predicted_side == actual_winner; null until settled

model_probability.description: Model probability for predicted side in [0, 1]

sp_fip_delta.description: Signed SP FIP delta (away_FIP - home_FIP) for this game

selected_rule_home_plus_away_125_flag.description: True if row qualifies for TIER_C_HOME_PLUS_AWAY_125

shadow_rule_home_plus_away_100_flag.description: True if row qualifies for TIER_C_HOME_PLUS_AWAY_100

tier_b_candidate_flag.description: True if abs_sp_fip_delta in [0.25, 0.50) — mid-band accumulation

tier_a_watchlist_flag.description: True if abs_sp_fip_delta >= 1.50 — highest conviction watchlist

month.description: YYYY-MM month string derived from game_date

TIER_C_HOME_PLUS_AWAY_125.description: Tier C home picks (abs_sp_fip_delta >= 0.50, home advantage) + Tier C away picks (abs_sp_fip_delta >= 1.25, away advantage).
TIER_C_HOME_PLUS_AWAY_125.predicted_side_determination: sign(sp_fip_delta) — positive → home, negative → away, zero → home

TIER_C_HOME_PLUS_AWAY_100.description: Tier C home picks (abs_sp_fip_delta >= 0.50, home advantage) + Tier C away picks (abs_sp_fip_delta >= 1.00, away advantage).
TIER_C_HOME_PLUS_AWAY_100.predicted_side_determination: sign(sp_fip_delta) — positive → home, negative → away, zero → home

TIER_B_CANDIDATE.description: Mid-band games: abs_sp_fip_delta in [0.25, 0.50). Tracks below-Tier-C pitcher matchups. Requires n>=200 before P78 full analysis.

TIER_A_WATCHLIST.description: Highest conviction: abs_sp_fip_delta >= 1.50. Track but do not operationalize while n < 50.

step3_rule_contract.determinism_guarantee: All rule flags are pure functions of sp_fip_delta, abs_sp_fip_delta, and sp_fip_delta_available. No stochastic or external-API inputs.
step3_rule_contract.market_edge_separation: All four rules are odds-free. EV, CLV, Kelly, market_home_prob are optional future fields — NOT required for P77.

metrics_per_rule_per_month.name: n
metrics_per_rule_per_month.description: Number of games in this rule for this month

metrics_per_rule_per_month.name: hit_rate
metrics_per_rule_per_month.description: Fraction of games where predicted_side == actual_winner

metrics_per_rule_per_month.name: auc
metrics_per_rule_per_month.description: ROC-AUC if probability distribution supports it (requires n >= 20)

metrics_per_rule_per_month.name: home_n
metrics_per_rule_per_month.description: Count of home-side picks in this rule-month

metrics_per_rule_per_month.name: away_n
metrics_per_rule_per_month.description: Count of away-side picks in this rule-month

metrics_per_rule_per_month.name: home_hit_rate
metrics_per_rule_per_month.description: Hit rate for home-side picks only

metrics_per_rule_per_month.name: away_hit_rate
metrics_per_rule_per_month.description: Hit rate for away-side picks only

metrics_per_rule_per_month.name: tier_b_n
metrics_per_rule_per_month.description: Running total of Tier B candidate rows (abs_sp_fip_delta 0.25–0.50)

metrics_per_rule_per_month.name: tier_a_n
metrics_per_rule_per_month.description: Running total of Tier A watchlist rows (abs_sp_fip_delta >= 1.50)

metrics_per_rule_per_month.name: rolling_100_hit_rate
metrics_per_rule_per_month.description: Rolling 100-game hit rate (reported if cumulative n >= 100)

monthly_cadence_2026.action: First P77 check-in. Collect Tier C 2026 games. Compute June hit_rate. Report rule counts.
Tier B count check. Rolling accuracy monitor. Compute 3-month cumulative stats.
Mid-season stability review. Adjust shadow rule if downgrade criteria met.
P78 trigger: if Tier B n >= 200, launch sample expansion analysis.
End-season consolidation. Final 2026 accuracy report. Compute full-season AUC/Brier/ECE.
P80 trigger: if odds API key acquired, run market-edge analysis (deferred lane).

checkpoint_1.action: First interim accuracy check — no downgrade unless hit_rate < 0.50 for all games so far

checkpoint_2.action: Rolling 100-game hit rate becomes available. Downgrade if hit_rate < 0.55.

operational_checkpoint.action: Full re-evaluation: compare primary vs shadow, update preferred rule.

seasonal_checkpoint.action: Final 2026 accuracy report. Decision on 2027 tracking configuration.

downgrade_criteria.action: Halt primary rule tracking. Escalate to P_REVIEW phase.

downgrade_criteria.description: Monthly hit_rate < 0.5 for 2 consecutive eligible months (n >= 10)
downgrade_criteria.action: Flag rule as degraded. Promote shadow rule to primary if shadow is stable.

downgrade_criteria.description: ECE materially worsens vs P75B baseline (delta ECE > 0.03 sustained over 2+ months)
downgrade_criteria.action: Trigger calibration review. Do not downgrade on a single month.

tier_b_reeval.comparison_target: Compare Tier B hit_rate vs Tier C finalists at n=200

tier_a_watchlist_reeval.action: Track monthly. Do not operationalize until n >= 50 in 2026 accumulation.

market_edge_lane.required_condition: THE_ODDS_API_KEY acquired AND historical odds for 2025-2026 available
market_edge_lane.separation_guarantee: Market-edge analysis (CLV/EV/Kelly) is kept in a separate, blocked lane. It CANNOT activate without explicit authorization and live odds data.

p78_recommendation.content: Full Tier B (abs_sp_fip_delta 0.25–0.50) sample expansion analysis. Compare Tier B vs Tier C finalists on 2026 live data.
p78_recommendation.market_edge_note: Market-edge (CLV/EV) analysis remains DEFERRED in P80 until odds API key acquired.
